scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$owners=@(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach($procId in $owners){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" && nodemon --watch src --ext js,ejs,css --signal SIGTERM src/server.js
